items.title: Presentation: Automating the Web With MCP: Infra That Doesn’t Break
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Automating the Web With MCP: Infra That Doesn’t Break. Paul Klein discusses the distributed systems challenges of scaling cloud-hosted browser infra for AI agents.

items.title: Coinbase Postmortem Reveals How a Localized AWS Failure Triggered a Multi-Hour Trading Outage
items.summaryShort: Coinbase Postmortem Reveals How a Localized AWS Failure Triggered a Multi-Hour Trading Outage. Coinbase has published a detailed postmortem of its May 7, 2026, outage, revealing how a localized cooling failure inside an AWS data center esca

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.summaryShort: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own. Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers.

items.title: PostgreSQL 19 Beta Introduces SQL Graph Queries and Concurrent Table Repacking
items.summaryShort: PostgreSQL 19 Beta Introduces SQL Graph Queries and Concurrent Table Repacking. PostgreSQL 19 Beta has been announced, with general availability expected in September, following the project's yearly major-release cadence.

items.title: Java News Roundup: A2A Java SDK 1.0, Jakarta EE 12, JNoSQL, GraalVM, Micrometer, OpenXava, Gradle
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: A2A Java SDK 1.0, Jakarta EE 12, JNoSQL, GraalVM, Micrometer, OpenXava, Gradle. This week's Java roundup for June 8th, 2026, features news highlighting: the GA release of A2A Java SDK 1.0; an update on Jakarta EE 12; poin

items.title: Anthropic's latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
items.summaryShort: Anthropic's latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests. Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

items.title: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effective
items.summaryShort: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effective. In the coming weeks, Apple will move anonymously generated emails addresses to a different domain.

items.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
items.summaryShort: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon. SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.
